scripts.tauri:dev:single: mkdir -p tmp/data && CO_NO_KEYCHAIN=true CO_DISABLE_NETWORK=true CO_BASE_PATH="$PWD/tmp/data" pnpm exec tauri dev
scripts.tauri:dev:a: mkdir -p tmp/data && CO_NO_KEYCHAIN=true CO_BASE_PATH="$PWD/tmp/data" pnpm exec tauri dev
scripts.tauri:dev:b: mkdir -p tmp/data-b && CO_NO_KEYCHAIN=true CO_BASE_PATH="$PWD/tmp/data-b" pnpm exec tauri dev --no-dev-server-wait -c src-tauri/tauri.dev-instance-b.conf.json
scripts.tauri:dev:c: mkdir -p tmp/data-c && CO_NO_KEYCHAIN=true CO_BASE_PATH="$PWD/tmp/data-c" pnpm exec tauri dev --no-dev-server-wait -c src-tauri/tauri.dev-instance-c.conf.json
scripts.clear:data: rm -rf tmp/data tmp/data-b tmp/data-c && echo "Cleared local CO data (tmp/data*). Restart with pnpm tauri:dev."
